name: AWS IAM Successful Root Console Login Without MFA
description: This model identifies successful root console logins to AWS accounts without Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), signaling potential security vulnerabilities or unauthorized access attempts. Such logins pose a high risk as they grant unrestricted access to critical AWS resources, increasing the likelihood of unauthorized data breaches or malicious activities.

rules.name: AWS IAM Successful Root Console Login Without MFA

author: Srivathsa H S and Sunil Bharti
